name: nextus-csm-crm
description: NextUS CSM - Multi-tenant, HIPAA-aware case & client management platform for injury law firms

scripts.build: node scripts/prepare-db.mjs && prisma generate && next build
scripts.setup: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('.env'))fs.copyFileSync('.env.example','.env')" && prisma db push && npm run seed
